case_title: ICE MACHINE INCORPORATED VS COLBERT TANYA IND/DBA LADY T'S

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT TANYA IND/DBA LADY  T'S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINE INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLBERT TANYA IND/DBA LADY  T'S $1,474.21 PRINCIPAL, $67.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,541.21, PAYMNTS AT $100/WEEK BEGINNING 10/23/95 & ON THE MONDAY OF EACH WEEK UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,474.21 FILED BY ICE MACHINE INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT TANYA IND/DBA LADY  T'S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
